figures.caption: Figure 4.1: The first case: L2 Relative Error of u1 and u2 under different working conditions at t = 0.5.
Figure 4.2: The first case: Root Mean Square Error of u1 and u2 under different working conditions at t = 0.5.

Figure 4.3: The first case: (a)(b) and (c)(d) show the predicted solutions and point-wise absolute errors of the Tr-PINNs algorithm; (e)(f) and (g)(h) show the predicted solutions and point-wise absolute errors of the PINNs algorithm; (i)(j) and (k)(l) show the numerical simulation results and point-wise absolute errors of OpenFOAM; (m)(n) denote the analytical solutions; (o)(p) show the point-wise errors between the Tr-PINNs predictions and OpenFOAM results.
Figure 4.4: The second case: L2 Relative Error of u1 and u2 under different working conditions at t = 0.5.
Figure 4.5: The second case: Root Mean Square Error of u1 and u2 under different working conditions at t = 0.5.

Figure 4.6: The second case: (a)(b) and (c)(d) show the predicted solutions and point-wise absolute errors of the Tr-PINNs algorithm; (e)(f) and (g)(h) show the predicted solutions and point-wise absolute errors of the PINNs algorithm; (i)(j) and (k)(l) show the numerical simulation results and point-wise absolute errors of OpenFOAM; (m)(n) denote the analytical solutions; (o)(p) show the point-wise errors between the Tr-PINNs predictions and OpenFOAM results.
Figure 4.7: The third case: L2 Relative Error of u1 and u2 under different working conditions at t = 0.5.
Figure 4.8: The third case: Root Mean Square Error of u1 and u2 under different working conditions at t = 0.5.

Figure 4.9: The third case: (a)(b) and (c)(d) show the predicted solutions and point-wise absolute errors of the Tr-PINNs algorithm; (e)(f) and (g)(h) show the predicted solutions and point-wise absolute errors of the PINNs algorithm; (i)(j) and (k)(l) show the numerical simulation results and point-wise absolute errors of OpenFOAM; (m)(n) denote the analytical solutions; (o)(p) show the point-wise errors between the Tr-PINNs predictions and OpenFOAM results.
